news.title: Is GN Store Nord (CPSE:GN) Now Fairly Priced After Volatile Recent Share Performance
news.summary: If you are wondering whether GN Store Nord is priced attractively today, the recent share performance gives you some useful clues before getting into the valuation work. The stock last closed at DKK 98.04, with a 7 day return of 2.8% decline, a 30 day return of 7.9%, a year to date return of 10.8% decline, a 1 year return of 8.1%, a 3 year return of 36.4% decline, and a 5 year return of 81.5% decl

news.title: Amplifon’s Big Bet Has Investors Hearing Alarm Bells
news.summary: The Italian hearing care group says buying GN Hearing will create an audiology powerhouse, but the market is worried it is paying a high price to fix a slowing growth story.

news.title: Amplifon to acquire GN Hearing in $2.6bn deal
news.summary: The transaction will see GN receive cash and shares, with completion targeted by the end of 2026, pending approvals.

news.title: Amplifon to Buy GN Store Nord Hearing-Aid Unit in $2.6 Billion Deal
news.summary: GN Store Nord shares jump 42% after Amplifon agrees to acquire its hearing-aid business for 17 billion Danish kroner.
